d: They Won’t Stop Asking For Ramen… So today we’re making spicy ramen loaded with a massive tomahawk steak. My kids have been asking for ramen nonstop, and after ignoring them for several days, I finally gave in. One kid wants everything so spicy it feels like a bad decision. The other just wants meat. Honestly, if it used to have a heartbeat, Maverick is interested. So I combined both worlds and made spicy ramen topped with a reverse-seared tomahawk steak. Somehow it ended up being one of those meals that looked ridiculous on paper but actually turned out incredible. And because the only thing these two can agree on is avoiding seed oils, I used @Chosen Foods products to bring everything together. Turns out peace in the household was only one giant steak and a bowl of ramen away. #recipe #ramen #steak #food

📌 SAVE THIS RECIPE FOR LATER A restaurant would charge you $40 or more for a plate like this, but today we’re making it right at home. 🔥🦀🐟 This Lemon Garlic Butter Crab Stuffed Salmon is packed with lump crab meat, seasoned to perfection, and finished with a buttery lemon garlic sauce that’ll have you going back for seconds. 🦀 Crab Stuffing • 8 oz lump crab meat • ¼ cup mayo • 1 egg • ¼ cup crushed Ritz crackers • 1 tbsp Dijon mustard • 1 tsp Garlic & Herb Old Bay • 1 tsp garlic powder • 1 tsp onion powder • 1 tbsp fresh parsley • Pinch of salt • 1 tsp lemon zest • Splash of lemon juice Mix gently. Don’t overwork the crab. Add a little extra Ritz cracker if needed until the mixture is thick but not dry. 🐟 Salmon Seasoning • Garlic powder • Onion powder • Paprika • Lemon pepper • Black pepper • Light Cajun seasoning Pat salmon dry, cut a pocket into the side, season generously, and stuff with the crab mixture. 🧈 Lemon Garlic Butter Sauce • 1 stick butter • 1 tbsp minced garlic • Juice of 1 lemon • 1 tsp Old Bay • 1 tsp parsley Cook low and slow until combined. 🔥 Cooking Instructions Sear salmon in a hot cast iron skillet over medium heat for 2–3 minutes per side. Transfer to a 400°F oven. Bake for 18–22 minutes. During the last few minutes, spoon lemon garlic butter over the top. Broil lightly if desired. 🍚 Lemon Herb Rice • Butter • Garlic • Chicken broth • Lemon zest • Fresh parsley 🌱 Roasted Garlic Lemon Asparagus • 1 bunch asparagus • 1 tbsp olive oil • 1 tbsp melted butter • 1 tsp garlic • Salt • Black pepper • Lemon zest Roast at 425°F for 10–12 minutes. Finish with fresh lemon juice. If you make this recipe, tag me so I can see it! ❤️ #CookUpKi #CrabStuffedSalmon #SalmonRecipe #EasyDinnerIdeas #SeafoodRecipe

How to Make Gordon Ramsay’s Scrambled Eggs ⭐️⭐️⭐️  FULL RECIPE BELOW ⬇️  NOTE: For an in-depth look at Gordon’s recipe, check out any of his videos. He has multiple across platforms, and he’ll be able to explain his recipe better than I can.  - MY RECIPE -  INGREDIENTS: 4 large eggs 1 tbsp unsalted butter Fine sea salt (to taste) 1/4 bunch chives  1. Start by finely cutting your chives as thinly as possible. 2. Pre-heat a good non-stick pan over medium heat for 1-2 minutes. In the meantime time, crack your eggs into a bowl and beat them with a fork until homogeneous. If you want to go the extra mile, pass your eggs through a fine mesh strainer to ensure they are extra smooth.  3. Add your butter to the pan, and once it is completely melted and starts to foam, add your eggs. Immediately turn the heat down to medium-low. Start stirring your eggs with a spatula, but not "risotto-style" like Gordon does - you want your egg to form nice small curds in the pan as you stir. The best motion to use is a "figure 8" pattern, where you bring the egg from the outside edge of the pan (where the egg cooks faster), towards the inside of the pan. While doing this, move your pan on and of the heat to control the temperature of the pan. You do not want your eggs catching or scorching. 4. What I’m looking for when cooking scrambled eggs is the point where the eggs have just started to set (they do not run around the pan when you tilt it), but they are still wet to the touch. This is when you should season your eggs with salt (and pepper if you’d like), and serve immediately. Even if your eggs seem slightly undercooked, residual heat will continue to cook them, so it is best to serve them at this point.  5. Garnish with your chopped chives, and enjoy! #scrambledeggs #eggs #gordonramsay #homecooking #recipe

Crispy XL Pork Chops  🍋 Crispy, golden, and finished with a squeeze of fresh lemon. These breaded pork cutlets are easy to make and perfect for a weeknight dinner. Serve them with a simple salad and you've got a meal everyone will love.  Ingredients: Bone-in pork chops Flour Eggs Breadcrumbs Salt Frying oil Fresh lemon Directions: 1. Butterfly the pork chops by cutting them open without separating them completely. Pound them thin until evenly flattened. 2. Dredge each pork chop in flour, then egg, and finally breadcrumbs, pressing so the coating sticks. 3. Fry in hot oil for a few minutes per side until golden brown, crispy, and cooked through. 4. Transfer to a plate and season with salt while still hot. Serve with a squeeze of fresh lemon and a simple side salad. #pork #easyrecipe #fy

Home Cooking Sessions: Hachis Parmentier. The French Shepherds Pie. Full recipe and long-form video now up on Substack, link in bio 🇫🇷🥩 - Today’s recipe is a real crowd pleaser. At its core, it’s a simple combination of slow-cooked beef and mashed potato, but like many French classics, the magic comes from the attention paid to each individual component. In this version I make a few tweaks to the traditional recipe whilst staying true to the components that make it so special. The result sits somewhere between a great cottage pie and a luxurious beef bourguignon. Deeply savoury, rich without feeling heavy and exactly the sort of dish that rewards a slow Sunday afternoon in the kitchen. For the full recipe, head over to Substack and hit subscribe - link in bio. NF x

d: Sheet Pan Chicken Taco Lettuce Boats I forget how ridiculously good this recipe is every single time I make it. Crispy taco chicken, chili-lime street corn, all the cold toppings, and somehow you still feel like a functioning adult afterward instead of needing a nap. And yes, I used queso fresco. Mind your business.                    Ingredients For the chicken: * 2½ lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs, chopped small * 2 packets taco seasoning * 1 teaspoon garlic powder * 1 teaspoon smoked paprika * Juice of 1 lime For the chili-lime corn: * 4 fresh ears of corn, kernels shaved off * ½ purple onion, diced * 1 tablespoon olive oil * 1 teaspoon chili powder * Salt to taste * Juice of ½–1 lime * ½ cup queso fresco * Fresh cilantro, chopped For serving: * Green leaf lettuce (sandwich cut) * Diced avocado * Pico de gallo * Jalapeño slices * Crema or Greek yogurt * Extra cilantro Instructions 1. Preheat oven to 425°F and line a sheet pan with parchment paper. 2. Toss chopped chicken with taco seasoning, garlic powder, smoked paprika, and lime juice. 3. Spread chicken onto one side of the sheet pan in an even layer. No oil needed. 4. Bake for 10 minutes. 5. Toss corn and purple onion with olive oil, chili powder, and salt. 6. Remove the pan, push chicken to one side, and add the corn mixture to the empty side. 7. Return to oven for another 10 minutes, then broil the last 3 minutes for crispy edges and charred corn. 8. Remove from oven and squeeze lime juice over the corn. Top with queso fresco and cilantro. 9. Assemble lettuce boats with chicken, street corn, avocado, pico, jalapeños, crema, and extra cilantro #taco #dinner #recipe #sheetpandinner #chicken
zh: 烤盘鸡肉塔可生菜船——每次做这道菜我都会忘记它有多好吃。酥脆塔可鸡肉、辣柠檬街头玉米、各种冷配料，吃完还不会犯困。食材：鸡肉部分：2.5磅去骨去皮鸡腿肉（切小块）、2包塔可调料、1茶匙蒜粉、1茶匙烟熏辣椒粉、1个青柠汁；辣柠檬玉米部分：4根新鲜玉米（削粒）、半个紫洋葱（切丁）、1汤匙橄榄油、1茶匙辣椒粉、盐适量、半至1个青柠汁、半杯新鲜白奶酪、新鲜香菜（切碎）；配菜：绿叶生菜、牛油果丁、墨西哥莎莎酱、墨西哥辣椒片、酸奶油或希腊酸奶、额外香菜。做法：烤箱预热至220°C，烤盘铺烘焙纸；鸡肉拌入调料和青柠汁；铺在烤盘一侧，烤10分钟；玉米和紫洋葱拌油和调料，铺在另一侧，再烤10分钟，最后烤3分钟至焦脆；出炉后挤青柠汁，撒白奶酪和香菜；将所有配料装入生菜叶中即可享用。

d: crispy chicken caesar salad croissants 🥗🥐 these over the wraps anyday omg 😣     recipe:   ingredients- 4 thin sliced chicken breasts 1 cup all-purpose flour (120g) seasonings (to taste)- salt, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, italian seasoning, chili powder, kinder bold chicken seasoning blend for the wet mixture- 2 eggs 2–3 tbsp heavy cream (30–45g) 1–2 tbsp pickle juice for the coating- 1½ cups panko breadcrumbs (90g) 2–3 tbsp grated parmesan for the caesar salad- romaine lettuce, chopped croutons extra parmesan other ingredients- 4 large croissants oil for frying garlic butter- 2 tbsp melted butter (28g) 1 clove garlic, minced parsley extra parmesan caesar dressing- 1 cup mayo (240g) ½ cup finely grated parmesan (50g) 2–3 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp lemon juice (30g) 1 tbsp dijon mustard (15g) 1 tsp worcestershire sauce ½ tsp salt ½ tsp black pepper ¼ cup olive oil (60g) 2–4 tbsp water (to thin if needed) instructions: season the chicken generously with your spices. in one bowl, mix the flour with any remaining seasoning. in another bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, and pickle juice. in a third bowl, combine the panko and parmesan. coat each piece of chicken in the flour, then the egg mixture, then the panko mixture. let the breaded chicken rest for 5–10 minutes. fry in oil over medium heat until golden brown and cooked through, about 4–5 minutes per side. transfer to a wire rack. for the dressing, whisk together the mayo, parmesan, garlic, lemon juice, dijon, worcestershire, salt, and pepper. slowly whisk in the olive oil, then add water until smooth and pourable. toss the chopped romaine with some of the caesar dressing. add croutons and extra parmesan. slice the croissants in half and spread a little caesar dressing on both sides. add the crispy chicken, top with the caesar salad mixture, and sprinkle with more parmesan. mix together the melted butter, garlic, and parsley. brush the tops of the croissants with the garlic butter and finish with extra parmesan. serve immediately and enjoyyyy    #caesarsalad #crispychicken #croissant #Recipe #EasyRecipe

This is what I cooked today as a private chef in Beverly Hills. A dish I’ve cooked many times for them. I’ve made this dish quite a few times for my clients and it’s one of their favorites. I usually buy a whole chicken when my clients want chicken for a few reasons.  One, it’s so that I don’t get rusty in my chicken fabrication. Two. one of my clients enjoy a slice of the breast, a thigh, and a wing,  While the other enjoys 2 slice of breast, a thigh, and a leg! Three. It gives me a carcass and bones to make stock with. Four. It’s much more economical than buying all those parts individually. Five. Leftovers usually get rolled into a second meal for salad or a grain bowl. Six. Ultra Soft Burger Buns ✨ Ingredients * 1 tsp yeast * 260g milk (about 1 cup + 2 tbsp) * 350g flour (about 2¾ cups) * 1 tsp salt * 40g softened butter (3 tbsp) Instructions 1. In a bowl, mix yeast and milk. Add flour and mix until combined. 2. Add salt and softened butter, then stretch and fold or coil fold until the butter is fully incorporated. 3. Cover and let rest for 2 hours or until doubled in size. 4. Divide the dough into 5 equal portions. Shape each piece into a burger bun as shown in the video and place on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. 5. Cover for 15 minutes, brush with milk, then bake at 400°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the heat to 380°F and continue baking until golden brown. 6. As soon as they come out of the oven, brush with butter and cover until completely cooled.  #bread #homemadebread #breadtok #baking #bakingrecipe

d: Cacio e Pepe🇮🇹🧀 Ingredients (Serves 2) • 250g spaghetti or tonnarelli • 120g Pecorino Romano, finely grated • 2 tsp freshly cracked black pepper • Pasta water, reserved Instructions 1. Grate the cheese:     Finely grate the Pecorino Romano.     The finer the cheese, the smoother the sauce. 2. Cook the pasta:     Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.     Cook the pasta until al dente.     Reserve at least 250ml of pasta water before draining. 3. Make the cheese cream:     Add a small amount of warm pasta water to the Pecorino Romano.     Whisk continuously.     Slowly add more water until you have a smooth, creamy sauce. 4. Toast the pepper:     Add the black pepper to a dry pan over medium heat.     Toast for 30–60 seconds until fragrant. 5. Build the sauce:     Add a splash of pasta water to the pan with the pepper.     Add the cooked pasta and toss well. 6. Combine:     Remove the pan from direct heat.     Add the Pecorino mixture and continue tossing.     Add more pasta water if needed until silky and glossy. 7. Serve:     Finish with extra Pecorino Romano.     Top with freshly cracked black pepper. #cacioepepesauce #cacioepepe #pastarecipes #dinnerideas #easyrecipes
zh: 罗马奶酪黑胡椒意面（Cacio e Pepe）食材（2人份）：250g意面、120g佩科里诺罗马诺奶酪、2茶匙现磨黑胡椒、煮面水。做法：磨细奶酪；煮面至弹牙，留250ml面水；将面水少量加入奶酪中搅拌成顺滑奶酪酱；干锅炒香黑胡椒30-60秒；加少许面水入锅，放入意面翻拌；离火后加入奶酪酱继续翻拌，按需加面水至顺滑光亮；装盘，撒额外奶酪和现磨黑胡椒。

d: Aglio e Olio🍝🧄 Ingredients (Serves 2) • 250g spaghetti • 6 garlic cloves, thinly sliced • 60ml extra virgin olive oil • 1 tsp red chilli flakes (adjust to taste) • Handful fresh parsley, finely chopped • Salt • Pasta water, reserved Instructions 1. Cook the pasta:     Bring a large pot of heavily salted water to a boil.     Cook the spaghetti until al dente.     Reserve at least 250ml pasta water before draining. 2. Build the sauce:     Add the olive oil to a large pan over medium heat.     Add the sliced garlic and chilli flakes.     Cook gently until the garlic turns lightly golden.     Do not let it burn. 3. Emulsify:     Add the cooked pasta directly to the pan.     Add a splash of pasta water.     Toss continuously until the oil and water form a silky sauce. 4. Finish:     Remove from the heat.     Stir through the chopped parsley.     Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. 5. Serve:     Plate immediately and finish with extra parsley and chilli flakes if desired. #pastatiktok #aglioeoliopasta #dinnerideas #easyrecipes #pastarecipes
zh: 蒜香橄榄油意面（Aglio e Olio）食材（2人份）：250g意面、6瓣大蒜切片、60ml特级初榨橄榄油、1茶匙红辣椒碎、新鲜欧芹、盐、煮面水。做法：煮面至弹牙，留250ml面水；中火将蒜片和辣椒碎在橄榄油中炒至微金黄（勿焦）；加入意面和少许面水翻拌乳化成顺滑酱汁；离火拌入欧芹，调味；装盘撒欧芹和辣椒碎。

d: Tap here for full recipe⇩ Let me share one of my recent favourites! This sweet and savoury black pepper chicken is seriously addictive. My family fights over the last piece! Give it a try! 🙌 Ingredients -3 chicken thigh fillets ⭐︎For the marinade -1 tbsp soy sauce -1 tbsp sake -1 tsp garlic koji (or 1 tsp grated garlic) ⭐︎For the sauce -1½ tbsp soy sauce -1½ tbsp sake -1 tbsp honey -Potato starch, as needed -Oil, as needed -Freshly ground black pepper, to taste Method ①Slice the chicken thighs lengthwise into thinner pieces. Place in a bowl, add the marinade ingredients, and leave for a short while. ②Coat the chicken with potato starch and fry in a little extra oil. ＊Place all the chicken in the pan before turning on the heat. ③Mix the sauce ingredients together. ④Once both sides are golden brown and the chicken is cooked through, remove any excess oil and add the sauce. ⑤Toss the chicken in the sauce until well coated. Let the sauce reduce slightly, then turn off the heat and finish with plenty of black pepper. Follow for more simple Japanese home cooking 🥢 #dinneridea #chickenrecipe #comfortfood #japanesehomecooking #japanesefood
zh: 点击查看完整食谱。分享一道近期最爱——甜咸黑胡椒鸡，超级上瘾，家人都抢着吃！食材：3块鸡腿肉；腌料：酱油1大勺、清酒1大勺、蒜曲1茶匙（或蒜泥）；酱汁：酱油1.5大勺、清酒1.5大勺、蜂蜜1大勺；另需土豆淀粉、食用油、现磨黑胡椒。做法：鸡腿切薄片腌制片刻；裹淀粉后冷锅下油煎；两面金黄熟透后去多余油，加酱汁翻炒裹匀；稍收汁后关火，大量撒黑胡椒。关注更多简单日式家常菜。

d: LEMON BRÛLÉE 🍋 RECIPE ⬇️ This is a very simple but incredibly effective dessert. I saw a bunch of these recipes going around last summer, and thought I’d give it a go - well worth it. - Using 4 lemons (get ones without wax on the shell, as will use the zest), split 3 of them in half lengthways and remove the flesh  - Pass the flesh through a sieve measure out around 110ml, and reserve it in a bowl - In a saucepan add 500ml whipping cream, 120g white sugar, and the zest from the 4th lemon. Bring to a simmer and reduce slightly until it coats the back of a spoon - Pour the mixture back into the lemon shells and chill in the fridge for 6 hours or overnight - Top with brown sugar and use a torch to melt / brown it - Serve once the sugar has set hard #lemon #dessert #brulee #posset #cooking
zh: 柠檬焦糖布蕾食谱：取4个柠檬（无蜡皮），3个纵向对半切开取出果肉，过筛取约110ml果汁备用；锅中加500ml淡奶油、120g白糖和第4个柠檬皮屑，煮至微沸并稍浓稠至挂勺；倒入柠檬壳中，冷藏6小时或过夜；表面撒红糖，用喷枪炙烤至焦糖化；待糖凝固后即可享用。

d: Dinner #1 from my $50 grocery haul 🍴 Tonight we're making a One Pan Smoked Sausage Broccoli & Cheddar Pasta. This recipe is a great example of how I approach budget cooking. Instead of buying butter, flour, milk, and several seasonings to make a cheese sauce from scratch, we're using a jar of alfredo sauce as a creamy, pre-seasoned base and transforming it into a broccoli cheddar sauce with a little cheese and some smoked sausage. The goal isn't to make the fanciest dinner possible. The goal is to make a dinner that's affordable, easy to follow, family-friendly, and made with ingredients that can be used throughout the week. And honestly? This one tastes way more expensive than it is. #budgetmeals #cheapmeals #familydinner #mealplanning #dinnerideas

A whole FEAST of delicious food from📍 @Elevated Kitchen at their Pop Up at R.House here in Baltimore, MD until June 25th     What I got • Hot Honey Catfish & Shrimp w/yum yum sauce instead • Lamb Chops • Fried Chicken • Turkey Wings + All the sides (for research 🔬) I loved allllllllll the entrees, ESPECIALLY the fried shrimp & lamb chops!!!! My favorite sides were the potato salad, cabbage & sweet potatoes. The greens were good but more salty than seasoned, l prefer my greens seasoned versus salt heavy. The Mac & cheese was cool, I would prefer more flavor. It just taste like cheese & noodles, eating them with the sweet potatoes did what needed to be done though so I wasn't mad at all. The mango strawberry lemonade was very refreshing, however it is NOT sweet. If you are looking for a sweet drink this is not it, it’s more tart & light on the sugar/flavor but it is a nice drink.

One-Pot Sausage and Fennel Rigatoni ✨ Tonight’s dinner is a one-pot spin on Ina Garten’s classic sausage and fennel rigatoni. Sweet Italian sausage, caramelized fennel, white wine, parmesan, and a splash of cream come together in the coziest bowl of pasta. Ingredients below, full recipe is linked in my bio (it’s free)! 1 pound sweet Italian sausage, casings removed and torn into pieces 1 large fennel bulb, diced ½ large yellow onion, diced Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper 6 cloves garlic, finely minced, to taste ½ teaspoon crushed fennel seeds (or 1 teaspoon for a stronger fennel flavor) ½ teaspoon red pepper flakes 2 tablespoons tomato paste ½ cup dry white wine 5–6 cups chicken broth 1 pound rigatoni ½ cup heavy cream 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard (optional) 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, plus more for serving Zest of 1 lemon 1 tablespoon unsalted butter, optional ½ cup chopped fresh parsley, plus more for serving #inagarten #rigatoni #easydinner #dinnerideas #onepot

Traditional British Faggots & Onion Gravy 🇬🇧 A classic British comfort food dating back to the 19th century, especially popular in the Midlands and Wales. These rich pork and liver meatballs are packed with flavor and served with a savory onion gravy. Ingredients – Meatballs • 400g pork belly • 150g pork shoulder • 400g pork liver (or 200g liver + 200g heart) • 1 large onion, diced • 2 cloves garlic, minced • 1 tbsp cooking oil • 1 tsp dried thyme • 1 tsp dried sage • 1 tsp celery salt • ½ whole nutmeg, grated • 150g fresh breadcrumbs • 3 tbsp flour Ingredients – Onion Gravy • 1 tbsp cooking oil • 50g butter • 1 small onion, finely diced • 2 tbsp flour • 500ml beef stock • 1 tbsp tomato purée • 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce Method 1. Finely dice the onion and garlic. 2. Grind or finely mince the pork belly, pork shoulder, and liver. 3. Mix the meat with onion, garlic, herbs, celery salt, nutmeg, breadcrumbs, and flour. 4. Shape into large meatballs. 5. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for about 1½–2 hours until cooked through. 6. For the gravy, sauté onion in oil and butter until soft. 7. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. 8. Gradually whisk in beef stock. 9. Add tomato purée and Worcestershire sauce and simmer until thickened. 10. Serve the faggots smothered in onion gravy with mashed potatoes and peas. #BritishFood #TraditionalCooking #ComfortFood #FoodTok #HomeCooking 🇬🇧🍽️ @Momma J

Nutella cookie pie 🍪🤎✨ Ingredients: ¾ cup browned butter (160g) ⅔ cup brown sugar (140g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50g) 1 egg 1 tbsp heavy cream (15g) 1 tsp vanilla 2 cups all-purpose flour (235g) ½ tsp baking soda (3g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5g) Chocolate chips (as much as you want) Nutella for the middle Extra chocolate chips on top Instructions: Brown the butter and let it cool slightly. In a bowl whisk together the browned butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until glossy. Add the egg, heavy cream, and vanilla and whisk until smooth. Fold in the flour, baking soda, and salt until just combined, then fold in the chocolate chips. Line a round cake pan or pie dish with parchment paper. Press a little over half of the cookie dough into the bottom and slightly up the sides. Spread a thick layer of Nutella in the center, then cover with the remaining cookie dough. Add extra chocolate chips on top. Bake at 175°C (350°F) for about 25–35 minutes, until the edges are golden and the center is still slightly soft. Let it cool a bit before slicing so the Nutella stays gooey. Enjoy✨ #baking #cookie #chocolate #اكسبلور #nutella

Fun Fact✨They will soon be doing event pop ups (dj+more) and soon to be happy hour! 🇯🇵 @akedo.dc | 🚗1100 15th St NW  -hosted🤝 📷[23mm lens + IPhone 16Pro Video] Sandos: chicken, wagyu, pork, shrimp, vegetarian (bread a bit thick but flavor of inside is tasty!) + Premium Bento box (karaage could use more meat and less external batter) + Signature bento box + Tuna maki sushi + Kushiyaki skewers assortment (beef, pork belly, chicken yakitori, shishito pepper, spicy chicken wing, tofu) + Crispy rice tuna and vegetarian + Taiyaki soft serve (matcha&yuzu swirl) + Hokkaido breeze pizza + Boba tea + strawberry mochi | 👋models: @thatyiespresso + @nicky.160 #japanesestreetfood #dcfood #washingtondc #fyp #dmvfoodie

d: Most tourists miss this street in Tokyo. Sunamachi Ginza is about a 15–20 min walk from Nishi-Ojima. It’s known for cheap, local street food and a famous oden spot locals line up for daily. You’ll find oden, yakitori, fried chicken, and sweets all along the street. Go late morning, bring cash, and visit on the 10th for discounts. Would you try this? #tokyojapan  #japanfood #japantravel

d: #indianstreetfood #fyp #india #streetfood ##streetfoodindia

If you’ve watched K-dramas, you’ve probably seen Hotteok before. Hotteok is one of Korea’s most loved winter street foods — a nostalgic comfort food that many Koreans grew up eating during cold weather. Traditionally, it’s made with a yeast dough filled with brown sugar and cinnamon, then pressed on a hot pan until crispy outside and molten inside. This easy overseas version uses frozen paratha instead of making dough from scratch.

d: Hand-drawn games are going extinct, but this one keeps the hope alive. In this game, you run a space checkpoint and screen a stream of tourists passing through — and we're talking meme cats, Evangelion characters, Half-Life headcrabs, you name it. The gameplay draws heavily from Papers Please and No, I'm Not a Human, but it still carves out a genuinely unique space in the current indie game scene. Game: Xenofeels #XenoFeelspartner #indiegame #papersplease #whattoplay #horrorgame
zh: 手绘风格游戏正在消亡，但这款让希望延续。游戏中你负责管理太空检查站，审核过往的游客——包括梗图猫、新世纪福音战士角色、半条命头蟹等等。玩法大量借鉴了《请出示证件》和《不，我不是人类》，但在当前独立游戏圈中仍开辟出独特的一席之地。游戏名：Xenofeels

 Lily’s World XD is a psychological horror game where you investigate a teenage girl’s computer and piece together what happened to her before it’s too late… but you’re NOT the only one with access! Featuring Y2K internet nostalgia and fourth-wall-breaking horror.

d: How you can use heat to remove stickers in my cozy indie cleaning game  This video is about the problem people were having with stickers in my indie cleaning game. you could pull them and remove them like regular stickers, but the mechanics were quite difficult and it was pretty easy to leave a bunch of sticker residue behind, and tear the stickers too. Instead of tweaking the glue to make it easier, i've given the hair dryer tool the ability to heat up the stickers, which will let you remove the stickers much easier if you spend the time to warm it up enough. Its a satisfying new bit of gameplay that i think looks really nice with the stickers glowing in the heat.  Cozy Game Restoration is a solo developed indie game on steam, and it's packed full of fun little tactile moments like this one in this video #cozygame #indiegame #gamedev #satisfying #steam #nextfest
zh: 如何在我的温馨独立清洁游戏中用热风去除贴纸。这期视频讲的是玩家在处理贴纸时遇到的问题。之前可以像普通贴纸一样撕掉，但操作难度较大，容易留下残胶或把贴纸撕破。为此我没有调整胶水参数，而是给吹风机工具加入了加热贴纸的功能，充分加热后贴纸会更容易取下，热力效果看起来也很好看。《Cozy Game Restoration》是一款 Steam 上的独立单人游戏，充满各种有趣的触感小细节

d: Title - Still Shining Total Episodes - 10 Watch on Netflix Still Shining (2026) is a 10-episode, slow-burn romantic melodrama on Netflix and JTBC that follows the emotional journey of Yeon Tae-seo (Park Jin-young) and Mo Eun-ah (Kim Min-ju), high school exes who reconnect a decade after parting ways. The series, directed by Kim Yoon-jin (Our Beloved Summer) and written by Lee Sook-yeon (Tune in for Love), explores themes of first love, personal growth, and healing from past trauma as the characters meet again in their late 20s and navigate their changed lives. It is characterized by its quiet, introspective tone, and nostalgic, warm cinematography, focusing on a realistic and mature romance rather than rapid plot twists. The story explores how the couple, who were each other's solace during their high school years, find their way back together despite the baggage of missed opportunities and long-term separation. #kdrama #kdramalover #kdramaedit #kdramas #kdramafyp
zh: 剧名：《依然闪耀》，共10集，在Netflix播出。《依然闪耀》（2026）是Netflix与JTBC联合出品的10集慢热浪漫情感剧，讲述高中时代的前男女主角延泰序（朴振永饰）与莫恩雅（金珉珠饰）在分开十年后重新相遇的情感历程。该剧由金允珍（《我们的蓝调时光》）执导，李淑娟（《爱的迫降调频》）编剧，以安静内省的基调与温暖怀旧的摄影风格，聚焦现实而成熟的爱情，探讨初恋、成长与治愈过去创伤等主题。故事讲述这对曾是彼此慰藉的高中情侣，在错过与长久分离的重压下，如何在二十岁末再度找到彼此。

d: The Flash: Analog Horror. Part 1. Missing. Attention!!! Emergency Message!!! On April 26th, at exactly 2:00 AM,  seven children in different parts of the country  woke up at the same moment in a state of fear. Each of them claims that a figure was standing beside their bed. A being with brightly glowing eyes in yellow suit with thunder on it The strangest part — all of the children describe the exact same person. Despite being up miles apart from each other. And all of it happened at the exact same minute. According to the children, the entity said only one word — a number. Each child heard a different one. From 1 to 7. But the real horror began the next day. At exactly the same time — 2:00 AM — five of the children disappeared. No surveillance camera captured the abductor, or even the moment of disappearance. Missing children: 	•	Bruce Wayne, 9 years old 	•	Oliver Queen, 7 years old 	•	Hal Jordan, 9 years old 	•	Arthur Curry, 8 years old 	•	Diana Prince, 9 years old Only two of the seven did not disappear: 	•	Clark Kent, 8 years old 	•	Barry Allen, 7 years old Clark Kent received the number 1, and Barry Allen received 3. #TheFlash #BarryAllen #AnalogHorror #Batman #Horror
zh: 闪电侠：模拟恐怖 第一部 失踪。紧急警告！4月26日凌晨2点整，全国各地七名儿童同时从恐惧中惊醒，每人都声称床边站着一个身穿黄色雷电服、双眼发出明亮光芒的人影。最诡异的是——所有孩子描述的是同一个人，尽管他们相距数英里。那个实体只说了一个词——一个数字，每个孩子听到的各不相同，从1到7。第二天凌晨2点，五名儿童失踪，监控未捕捉到任何画面。失踪儿童：Bruce Wayne（9岁）、Oliver Queen（7岁）、Hal Jordan（9岁）、Arthur Curry（8岁）、Diana Prince（9岁）。未失踪的两人：Clark Kent（8岁，编号1）、Barry Allen（7岁，编号3）。

The Flash: Analog Horror. Part 5. Henry Allens Guilt. Henry Allen has been taken into police custody on suspicion of kidnapping five children. Investigators found his hair and traces of his DNA at every location where the children were discovered. In addition, a yellow suit with lightning symbols matching the children’s descriptions was found inside his apartment. During questioning, the children also recalled that the Yellow Man constantly mentioned Barry Allen. Bruce Wayne stated that he once overheard him saying, “One day Barry will become great, but thanks to these children, his greatness will be slightly changed.” A drawing was also found in the Allen household depicting seven children, with names written above them: Batman, Aquaman, Flash, Lantern, Wonder Woman, and Superman. According to investigators, the drawing appeared to have been made by Barry, while Henry allegedly turned his fantasy into reality. However, Barry denies drawing it, and Henry denies any involvement in the children’s disappearance. This is not the first time Henry has come under suspicion for a crime. Several years ago, he was investigated in connection with the death of his wife, but there was not enough evidence to charge him. Additionally, after seeing Henry, the children confirmed that his height, mannerisms, and voice resembled those of the Yellow Man. Several of them suffered panic attacks upon hearing his voice. The only person who denied Henry’s guilt was Clark Kent, who had not been kidnapped alongside Barry. According to him, if Henry really were the Yellow Man, there would have been no way the police could have caught him. #TheFlash #BarryAllen #AnalogHorror #DC #Horror

The setup turns the viral brainrot character into your dance partner, mixing Lil Baby rap energy, TikTok duet timing, and chaotic Tung Tung Tung Sahur movement into one easy-to-remake template. What makes this work is the interaction. Instead of just watching Tung Tung Tung Sahur dance, the template gives you a clear moment to join in, match the beat, and complete the trend yourself. The On Me lyric already has that confident flex energy, and pairing it with Triple T makes the whole thing feel funny, hype, and instantly remixable. Use this CapCut template for dance duets, green screen jokes, rap trend edits, or any post where you want to look like you are dancing with Tung Tung Tung Sahur. d: Crispy Chicken Shawarma Wraps 🔥 For all of you asking about my recipe organizing app, search “Osta” on the app or google play store 🫶 Juicy chicken shawarma, creamy garlic sauce and crispy fries wrapped into one perfect bite 🌯 For the Chicken: -1.5 lbs (680g) skinless chicken thighs, sliced into strips -Seasoning: 1 tbsp paprika, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tbsp onion powder, 2 tsp coriander, 1 tsp allspice, 2 tsp turmeric, 2 tsp black pepper, 1 tsp salt -3 tbsp olive oil -8 garlic cloves, minced -2 tbsp tomato paste -1/3 cup Greek yogurt -½ lemon, juiced For the Onions: -1 red onion, thinly sliced -2 tbsp olive oil -½ lemon, juiced -1/4 cup fresh parsley, finely chopped -1 tsp salt, 1 tsp black pepper, 2 tsp sumac For the Garlic Sauce: -1/2 cup Greek yogurt -1/2 cup mayonnaise -3 garlic cloves, minced -1/4 lemon, juiced For the Red Sauce Glaze: -1/4 cup olive oil + 2 tbsp tomato paste -1 tbsp pomegranate molasses (optional) -1 tsp paprika For Assembly: -3 Roma tomatoes, diced -Pitas -Frozen french fries Instructions: 1. In a bowl, combine the sliced chicken, spices, olive oil, garlic, tomato paste, yogurt, and lemon juice. Mix well & marinate for as long as your patience can handle, up to overnight. 2. In a large pan over medium-high heat, add a layer of olive oil. Once hot, add the chicken. Cook undisturbed for 3 mins, then cook for 6–7 more mins, stirring often, until golden & cooked through. 3. In a bowl, combine the sliced red onion, olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, salt, pepper, and sumac. Toss well, set aside. 4. In a bowl, mix the Greek yogurt, mayo, garlic, and lemon juice. Set aside in fridge. 5. In a bowl, whisk olive oil, tomato paste, pomegranate molasses (if using), & paprika. 6. Prepare your French fries however you like. Assemble the wraps: spread a generous layer of garlic sauce onto each pita. Top with  chicken, French fries, diced tomatoes & the onions. Wrap tightly. 7. Melt butter in a pan over low heat. Place the wraps seam-side down & brush the tops with the red sauce. Cook until crispy golden, flip, brush the other side, & repeat. Top with more garlic sauce. Enjoy!! #recipesoftiktok #dinnerideas #shawarma #viral #chicken

d: Honey BBQ Chicken Tenders 🍯 Level up a boring cookout with these chicken tenders using @Sweet Baby Ray’s to make a sticky + sweet honey bbq glaze 😋 The sauce takes these to another level, so don’t skip it 🙂‍↔️ 👉 full detailed recipes in bio 🔗 — RECIPE: Chicken (Dry Brine): 6–8 tenders tossed with kosher salt, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika. Rest uncovered in the fridge for at least 2 hours (overnight is best). Seasoned Flour + Wet Batter: Mix AP flour, cornstarch, baking powder, salt, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, cayenne, black pepper + pinch MSG. Move ~⅓ to another bowl and whisk with cold sparkling water until thin pancake batter. Double Dredge: Mix 1–2 tbsp wet batter into dry flour for craggly bits. Coat chicken: wet → dry → wet → dry (press to stick). Fry: 350°F oil for 4–6 mins until golden + CWISPY (and 165F internal). Honey BBQ Glaze: Heat BBQ sauce (Sweet Baby Ray’s), honey, butter, vinegar, hot sauce until smooth + glossy. Season to taste. Toss or brush chicken with glaze while it’s still hot. Finish: Top with herbs, an extra drizzle of sauce, & serve with ranch. Enjoy friends :)  — #sbrpartner #honeybbq #chickentenders #friedchicken #easyrecipe

d: Mac n cheese with garlic butter steak bites 🤤 RECIPE⬇️ Mac n cheese: * 12 oz pasta * Chicken bouillon (for boiling pasta) * 10 oz sharp white cheddar * 8 oz Colby Jack * 5-6 oz Mozzarella  * 2 oz Parmesan * 3 tbs butter * 3 tbs flour * 1 cup heavy cream (1.5 if you prefer saucier) * 1 12-oz can evaporated milk * 1 tsp Dijon mustard * 1 tsp garlic powder * 1 tsp paprika * Salt and pepper to taste Garlic butter steak bites: * 1 lb steak, cut into bite size cubes  * 1 tsp each: garlic powder, smoked paprika, Worcestershire * 1/2 tsp Montreal steak seasoning * 1/2 tsp dried thyme * Drizzle of oil  * Salt and pepper to taste * 1/2 stick butter * 1/4 small shallot, minced * 4-5 garlic cloves, minced * Optional: chopped parsley for garnish 1. In a bowl, mix the steak with some oil and all the seasonings. Let that marinate while you prep the mac. 2. Shred cheeses and mix together. Set aside. 3. Boil pasta in water that has been generously seasoned with chicken bouillon or salt until al dente, 1-2 min below box instructions. 4. Melt butter and bloom the spices - garlic powder, paprika - for 1 min. Then add the flour and cook for a 1-2 mins. 5. While whisking, slowly add in the heavy cream and evaporated milk. Whisk until smooth.  6. Once the mixture warms up again (but NOT simmering) turn off the heat and stir in half of your cheese mixture in batches until combined. 7. Layer in a baking dish, starting with half the mac mixture, half of the leftover cheese, the rest of the mac, and finally the rest of the cheese. Sprinkle some paprika on top for color. 8. Bake at 375F for 25-30 min until golden. Broil on low for a few min for more crust if desired. 9. While the mac is baking, add oil to a pan and sear the steak until desired doneness and it develops a nice crust. 10. 1 min before the steak is done, add 1/2 stick butter, garlic, and shallots and cook for the remaining time. 11. When mac is done baking, rest 10 min before serving and top with the steak bites. #macandcheese #steakbites #garlicbutter #creamypasta

d: Recipe Name Cheesy Sloppy Joe Garlic Toasts Ingredients 1. French bread, sliced – 8 pieces 2. Ground beef – 1 lb 3. Onion, diced – 1 small 4. Sloppy Joe sauce – 15 oz 5. Mozzarella cheese, shredded – 2 cups 6. Garlic butter – 4 tbsp 7. Salt – ½ tsp 8. Black pepper – ½ tsp Recipe 1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Brown ground beef and onion in a skillet. 3. Drain excess grease. 4. Stir in Sloppy Joe sauce. 5. Simmer for 5 minutes. 6. Spread garlic butter on bread slices. 7. Arrange bread on a baking sheet. 8. Toast for 5 minutes. 9. Spoon Sloppy Joe mixture onto each slice. 10. Top generously with mozzarella cheese. 11. Return to the oven. 12. Bake for 8–10 minutes until cheese melts. 13. Broil for 1–2 minutes if desired. 14. Let cool slightly before serving. Follow our account for more delicious recipes!
zh: 食谱：芝士肉酱蒜香吐司 食材：法棍面包8片、牛肉馅450克、小洋葱1个、肉酱汁425克、马苏里拉芝士2杯、蒜香黄油4汤匙、盐半茶匙、黑胡椒半茶匙 做法：烤箱预热190°C，炒熟牛肉馅和洋葱，沥油后加入肉酱汁煮5分钟；面包片涂蒜香黄油后烤5分钟，铺上肉酱，撒大量马苏里拉芝士，再烤8至10分钟至芝士融化，可再用上火烤1至2分钟，稍凉后即可享用。关注我们获取更多美食食谱！

d: S’mores Cookies 🍪🍫🤎 Soft, gooey cookies stuffed with chocolate, marshmallows, and crackers! Makes: 8 cookies Ingredients • 85 g butter, softened • 75 g granulated sugar • 75 g brown sugar • 1 egg • ½ tsp vanilla extract • 180 g all-purpose flour • ½ tsp baking powder • ½ tsp salt • 100 g dark chocolate, chopped • Chocolate pieces, marshmallows & crackers for filling Method 1. Preheat oven to 180°C (160°C fan). 2. Cream butter and sugars until fluffy. Mix in egg and vanilla. 3. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt, then mix into the wet ingredients. 4. Fold in the chopped chocolate. 5. Place a cracker, chocolate piece, and marshmallow together, then wrap completely with cookie dough. 6. Bake for 8–12 minutes until lightly golden. 7. Cool slightly and enjoy! 💌 #baking #bakingrecipe #smores #cookies #recipes
zh: S'mores曲奇 口感松软、内馅流心，夹有巧克力、棉花糖和饼干！可做8块 食材：黄油85克、细砂糖75克、红糖75克、鸡蛋1个、香草精半茶匙、中筋面粉180克、泡打粉半茶匙、盐半茶匙、黑巧克力碎100克，以及用于夹馅的巧克力片、棉花糖和饼干 做法：烤箱预热180°C，打发黄油和糖，加入鸡蛋和香草精，混入粉类，拌入巧克力碎，将饼干、巧克力和棉花糖包入面团，烤8至12分钟至表面微金黄，稍凉后享用。

d: This one is definitely on repeat 😅 One-Pan Marry Me Chicken Linguine 🍝🔥 Ingredients • 2 chicken breasts • 12 oz linguine • 1 tbsp olive oil • 3–4 garlic cloves (or jarlic if you’re lazy like me) • 1 tsp Italian seasoning • 1 tsp paprika • Salt + pepper • 1/2 tsp chili flakes (optional) • 1/2 cup sun-dried tomatoes • 3 cups chicken broth • 1–1.25 cups full-fat coconut milk • 1/2–3/4 cup Parmesan • Basil (chopped) How I Make It 1.  Season chicken and sear until golden and cooked through. Remove from pan. 2.  Cook garlic + sun-dried tomatoes for 1–2 mins. 3.  Add broth + coconut milk and simmer. 4.  Add dry linguine directly to the pan. Let soften, then twist into liquid with tongs when softened.  You may need to add a bit more broth as the pasta starts cooking, so it doesn't end up dry.  Monitor it. 5.  Simmer 10–12 mins, stirring often. 6.  Add chicken back once pasta is almost al dente. 7.  Stir in parm until creamy. Add extra broth or coconut milk if needed. 8.  Top with basil, extra parm + chili flakes. Enjoy! #easyrecipesathome #marrymechicken #comfortfood #cookingvideos
zh: 这道菜真的会反复做！一锅版"求婚鸡肉"意大利扁面 食材：鸡胸肉2块、扁面条340克、橄榄油1汤匙、蒜3至4瓣、意式香料1茶匙、红椒粉1茶匙、盐和黑胡椒、辣椒片半茶匙（可选）、日晒番茄半杯、鸡汤3杯、全脂椰奶1至1.25杯、帕玛森芝士半至四分之三杯、新鲜罗勒 做法：鸡肉调味后煎至金黄熟透取出；炒香蒜和日晒番茄，加入鸡汤和椰奶煮沸，将干面条直接放入锅中煮软，期间不断搅拌，视情况补充鸡汤；煮10至12分钟，面条将熟时放回鸡肉，加入帕玛森芝士搅拌至浓稠，最后撒罗勒、芝士和辣椒片即可。

d: This is what I made as a private chef in Beverly Hills. Risotto Nero! My clients have requested that I recreate one of their favorite dishes and that is risotto Nero or squid ink risotto from il pastaio here in Beverly Hills. #cooking #food #privatechef #personalchef #howtocook I’ve actually never been to the restaurant before so they sent me to try it before attempting to make it. I started off by making a seafood stock, but with a little bit of chicken stock as the base. added clam juice to fortify and I picked up one of these fish stock cubes from eataly. Of course it would have been nice to make one from scratch, but when you have an hour and a half to crank out lunch, these are fantastic. When I had the risotto at the restaurant, it was pretty rich and buttery so I cubed these up ahead of time to finish. Finely diced shallots, removed the tails from the shrimp, sliced calamari tubes, trimmed the legs, removed the feet of the scallops, and cut them into quarters so they would cook at the same time as the rest of the seafood. I also added all the scallop feet and shrimp tails into the seafood stock. With everything ready to go, I got some olive oil in a pot, sweated down the shallots and chopped garlic, and instead of arborio rice, I used carnaroli rice which is another Italian short grain rice that I actually prefer over arborio. I find it Holds its texture a bit better so the window before it turns to mush is more forgiving. Toast the rice in the oil to get it nice and nutty, deglaze with white wine, and burn off the alcohol. always slim the scum off your stock. Once the white wine had reduced and I couldn’t smell the alcohol, and only the floral acidic notes were left, I slowly started adding the seafood stock while constantly mixing. After about 10 minutes, I added the squid ink which is what gives risotto Nero the signature blackness and umami. In the future, I would probably dilute this in some water before adding to the risotto. It was a little difficult to spread it into the risotto evenly. It just kinda sunk to the bottom.  then continued to add more and more stock until it was 90% done cooking. The way I can tell the rice is done is by grabbing a grain, smushing it between my fingers to see what’s left. As you can probably tell, the rice is still completely raw, so we continue cooking. I actually had timed it to finish right at their normal lunch time, which is 1:15 but they told me that something came up and they would be eating an hour later than usual. So I pulled the rice and onto a sheet pan, spread it out thin to cool down as quickly as possible. This is actually what I would do in restaurants. Par cook the risotto rice and chill. Theres no way customers would wait 40 minutes for a risotto so this was absolutely necessary when we did have risotto on the menu.  About 20 minutes before lunch, I heat up some stock, throw in the rice, and just continue the cooking process. I did another grain test by crushing the grain between my fingers and you can see how the rice splits into 3 pieces. It’s almost there by not quite yet. if you want it al dente, I usually cook it until the rice is just one small dot. So just a little bit of a bite. i find cooking it any more than that will give you mushy rice and any more than 1 dot, you’ll just be munching on raw crunchy rice.  With the rice almost done cooking, I mounted with butter to make it rich and glossy, then just added the seafood, just to gently cook. The seafood in the risotto that I had was just barely cooked, which was lovely. Sweet, juicy, soft shrimp, scallops, and calamari. rubbery overcook shellfish is the worst.

Scallion pancake kbbq crunchwrap >> Taco Bell RECIPE ⬇️ * Frozen jumbo scallion pancakes * Bulgogi (I used pre-marinated) * Kimchi, roughly chopped * Shredded mozzarella * Cucumber, julienned * Scallions, sliced * Jalapeño, sliced  * Crispy fried onions * Spicy corn cheese Spicy corn cheese:  * Corn * Cream cheese * Mayo * Shredded mozzarella * Buldak sauce 1. For each crunch wrap, thaw 2 scallion pancakes. Once thawed, leave one full size and for the other cut out a smaller circle about 1 inch smaller than the original. 2. Cook your bulgogi until desired doneness and set aside to cool. 3. Briefly stir fry chopped up kimchi to evaporate excess liquid and slightly caramelize. 4. Mix together ingredients for the spicy corn cheese. Use more cream cheese than mayo. 5. On the larger pancake, assemble starting with a layer of corn cheese, shredded mozzarella, bulgogi, more mozzarella, scallions, jalapeños, kimchi, cucumbers, and crispy fried onions on top. 6. Cover with the smaller pancake and fold around until it’s completely closed. 7. Pan fry with plenty of oil on medium-low heat for 8-10 min per side, or until golden brown and crispy and the sides are translucent. #crunchwrap #scallionpancake #asianfusion #kbbq

GIANT Buldak Cheese Omelette in Korea | Street Food 이거 그냥 오믈렛 아님, 불닭볶음면 한 봉지 통째로 접어버린 치즈 폭탄임🤯🔥 철판 위에 계란 거대하게 깔고 불닭+소시지+치즈 미친 양 때려 넣는데 비주얼부터 압살💥 모짜렐라+체다 치즈가 폭포처럼 녹아내리고 매운 냄새 올라오는 순간 사람들 다 멈춤👀 한입 먹으면 촉촉한 계란 + 핵매운 불닭 + 꾸덕한 치즈 조합 미쳐버림… 명동 가면 무조건 저장각🤤 📍 위치 : 서울 중구 명동길 일대 (명동 길거리) 🏡 매장명 : 명동 불닭 치즈 오믈렛 노점 ⏰ 운영시간 : 유동적 (방문 전 확인 권장) 🚃 가까운역 : 명동역 6번 출구 도보 약 3분 💵 가격 : ₩10,000 / 토핑 추가 ₩2,000 English Version 🇺🇸 This isn’t just an omelette, it’s a giant Buldak cheese explosion 🤯🔥 Huge egg sheet on the grill stuffed with spicy noodles, sausage, and crazy amounts of cheese Mozzarella + cheddar melt like a waterfall while the spicy aroma makes everyone stop👀 One bite = soft egg + insanely spicy Buldak + gooey cheese overload… viral Myeongdong street food for real🤤 📍 Location : Myeongdong Street, Jung-gu, Seoul 🏡 Store : Buldak Cheese Omelette Street Stall ⏰ Hours : Varies by day (Check before visiting) 🚃 Nearest Station : Myeongdong Station Exit 6, 3 min walk 💵 Price : ₩10,000 / Extra Topping ₩2,000 #KoreanStreetFood #MyeongdongStreetFood #Buldak #CheeseOmelette #KoreanFood SeoulFood SpicyNoodles ViralFood
